summary: BC-9-N4-COND-4 (ML model-risk envelope, SR 11-7 model-risk gate) is UNCLOSED in the 2026-05-13 REM execution wave because REM-3 (ModelServingInterface ABC) and REM-10 (ML kill-switch + risk plumbing greenfield) are deferred indefinitely per Option B Strangler-Fig. No src/forex_system/ml/ subsystem exists at the time of this deferral. Disposition: re-opens whenever the strategy-#4 ML dispatch is initiated, blocked behind a multi-month greenfield ml/ design review and SR 11-7 model-risk gate authoring; not closeable in any classical-strategy execution wave.

BC-9-N4-COND-5 (per-strategy kill-switch Property-4 LIVE-PAPER exercise at N=2 before any N=3 transition) is UNCLOSED because REM-8 is operator-executed: it requires the live paper session running plus a deliberate kill-switch trigger to verify out-of-band reachability. The orchestrator cannot run paper loops per hard-constraint no_paper_loop_start_by_orchestrator. Disposition: requires a CEO-driven runbook executing REM-8 against the existing 2-strategy paper session before any strategy-#3 dispatch can proceed; blocks N=2 to N=3 transition exclusively.

BC-9-N4-COND-6 (Position.strategy_type field for ML-vs-classical risk-routing distinction in exposure_aggregator and kill_switch) is UNCLOSED because REM-1 added strategy_id (CTO D-1.2) but explicitly excluded strategy_type per the 2026-05-12 CTO-Major-1 wording. The strategy_type discriminator is only meaningful when an ML strategy is actually registered, which is gated by COND-4 deferral. Disposition: coupled to COND-4; reopens with strategy-#4 ML dispatch and lands in the same Position type-system change that introduces the ML registration path.
